constraints.message: RiskAssessment opda:riskIndicator MUST be one of the opda:YesNoNotKnownScheme values (No / Not known / Yes; ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4).

roleNotation.label: role notation
roleNotation.comment: Notation value naming the transactional role borne by a Seller / Buyer / Proprietor / Conveyancer / etc. Constrained by per-overlay profile shapes via SHACL `sh:in` over the SKOS RoleScheme members. Per ODR-0006 §Q2 the role-bearing pattern is encoded by `opda:Seller` / `opda:Buyer` / `opda:Proprietor` sub-classes of `opda:RoleMixin`; this predicate exposes the notation for DASH editor ergonomics and SPARQL convenience. Renamed from opda:role (ADR-0044) to avoid the case-clash with the opda:Role class.
roleNotation.definition: Relates a role-bearer to a coded notation naming the transactional role it bears (a member of opda:RoleScheme — Seller, Buyer, Proprietor, Conveyancer, etc.) — the notation surface exposing the role for editor and SPARQL ergonomics alongside the canonical class-membership encoding.

securityDeposit.label: security deposit
securityDeposit.comment: Security/tenancy deposit in the Property's letting information (refundable). Bearer opda:Property. → opda:MonetaryAmount (ODR-0024 R3); flat per §Q6a.
securityDeposit.definition: The refundable security deposit stated in a property's letting information.

sellerContributesToServiceCharge.label: seller contributes to service charge
sellerContributesToServiceCharge.comment: Yes/No discriminator: does the Seller contribute to a service charge for the Property? Applies to Leasehold / Managed Freehold / Commonhold per BASPI5. Bound to opda:YesNoScheme.
sellerContributesToServiceCharge.definition: A coded yes/no value recording whether the seller contributes to a service charge on a leasehold, managed-freehold, or commonhold LegalEstate.

sharedOwnershipRent.label: shared ownership rent
sharedOwnershipRent.comment: Rent payable on the retained share under a shared-ownership lease. Bearer opda:LegalEstate. → opda:MonetaryAmount (ODR-0024 R3); flat per §Q6a.
sharedOwnershipRent.definition: The rent payable on the retained share under a shared-ownership lease.

soldPrice.label: sold price
soldPrice.comment: Sold price of a comparable property (valuation comparable listing info). Bearer opda:Valuation. → opda:MonetaryAmount (ODR-0024 R3); flat per §Q6a.
soldPrice.definition: The price at which a comparable property was sold.

soldWithVacantPossession.label: sold with vacant possession
soldWithVacantPossession.comment: Yes/No discriminator: is the Property sold with vacant possession (vs sold subject to existing tenancies)? BASPI5 completion question. Bound to opda:YesNoScheme.
soldWithVacantPossession.definition: A coded yes/no value recording whether a Property is sold with vacant possession rather than subject to existing tenancies.

supportedBy.label: supported by
supportedBy.comment: Claim → Evidence join. Convenience predicate alongside the canonical PROV-O prov:wasDerivedFrom chain (Claim prov:wasDerivedFrom Evidence). opda:supportedBy is the opda-namespaced inverse-style predicate for downstream consumers that prefer an opda: name; both directions emit so consumers can query from either end.
supportedBy.definition: Relates a claim to a piece of evidence that backs it, providing an opda-namespaced counterpart to the canonical prov:wasDerivedFrom derivation chain.

targetsKind.label: targets kind
targetsKind.comment: DPV mapping record → OPDA Kind class. The Kind is the class whose instances bear the personal-data category named by opda:baselineCategory (with optional variant refinements).
targetsKind.definition: Relates a DPV mapping record to the OPDA Kind class whose instances bear the personal-data category the record assigns.

constraints.message: DPVMappingRecord MUST target exactly one Kind class via opda:targetsKind. ODR-0012 Phase 1 governance discipline (reference-not-import for DPV).

tenureKind.label: tenure kind
tenureKind.comment: Tenure classification per opda:TenureKindScheme — Substance Kind label (Freehold / Leasehold / Commonhold), a coded facet on opda:LegalEstate enforced by SHACL sh:in. Per the ODR-0011 §8a load-bearing cascade (Council session-036), tenure is +R but −I (no distinct identity criterion; tenure-change is a value change, not a re-typing) → classification, NOT a subclass: opda does NOT mint Freehold/Leasehold/Commonhold OWL sub-classes, and no skos:exactMatch-to-subclass is emitted (the §8a subclass binding applies only to load-bearing +I labels).
tenureKind.definition: The tenure classification of a LegalEstate (freehold, leasehold, or commonhold) drawn from the TenureKind scheme: a coded facet, not a subclass, since tenure change is a value change rather than a re-typing.

constraints.message: LegalEstate identity surface: tenureKind (Freehold / Leasehold / Commonhold) MUST be a single concept IRI when present. The full rights-bundle IC per ODR-0005 §3b is enforced by the registered-title binding via opda:recordsEstate.

transportType.label: transport type
transportType.comment: Type of a nearby transport facility (rail station / bus stop / …) — value-space opda:TransportTypeScheme (ODR-0024 R6), sh:in-restricted via the descriptive enum shape. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer, as opda:schoolType). Flat per §Q6a.
transportType.definition: The kind of a nearby transport facility, such as a rail station or bus stop, drawn from the opda:TransportTypeScheme value-space.

constraints.message: opda:transportType MUST be one of the opda:TransportTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

typeOfConnection.label: type of connection
typeOfConnection.comment: Broadband connection type of the Property (FTTP / FTTC / cable / …) — value-space opda:BroadbandConnectionTypeScheme (ODR-0024 R6), sh:in-restricted via the descriptive enum shape. Flat per §Q6a.
typeOfConnection.definition: The broadband connection technology serving a property, drawn from the opda:BroadbandConnectionTypeScheme value-space.

constraints.message: opda:typeOfConnection MUST be one of the opda:BroadbandConnectionTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

abilityToResideAtProperty.label: ability to reside at property
abilityToResideAtProperty.comment: Building-safety statement on whether occupiers can reside at the Property given any identified safety issues (typed as a string in the data dictionary). A physical-safety attribute of the Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
abilityToResideAtProperty.definition: A building-safety statement on whether occupiers can reside at a Property given any identified safety issues.

accessibilityAndAdaptations.label: accessibility and adaptations
accessibilityAndAdaptations.comment: Accessibility features and adaptations of the Property (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
accessibilityAndAdaptations.definition: An accessibility feature or adaptation present in a Property.

accountName.label: account name
accountName.comment: Name on the bank account of a leasehold / managed-freehold contact organisation (landlord / managing agent / management company / rentcharge owner / resident-tenants' association). ONE shared property reused across those contact blocks. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: bank-details domain — placed on opda:Organisation, no opda:BankAccount Kind minted.)
accountName.definition: The name in which a contact Organisation's bank account is held — the account holder for a landlord, managing agent, management company, rentcharge owner, or resident-tenants' association.

accountNumber.label: account number
accountNumber.comment: Bank-account number of a contact organisation. xsd:string (a fixed-width numeric identifier — leading zeros significant, per the opda:hasUPRN convention, NOT xsd:integer). ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: bank-details domain.)
accountNumber.definition: The account number of a contact Organisation's bank account, held as a string so that leading zeros remain significant.

actionAlertRating.label: action alert rating
actionAlertRating.comment: The ordinal action-alert rating for the RiskAssessment's peril: an integer 1–5 where 1 is Green (lowest risk) and 5 is Red (highest). Value-space is opda:ActionAlertRatingScheme; the node shape sh:in-restricts it (ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4).
actionAlertRating.definition: The action-alert severity of a risk assessment: an ordinal integer from 1 (Green, lowest risk) to 5 (Red, highest risk) grading the assessed peril.

constraints.message: RiskAssessment opda:actionAlertRating MUST be one of the opda:ActionAlertRatingScheme levels (integer 1–5, 1 Green … 5 Red; ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4).

addressVariant.label: address variant
addressVariant.comment: Required tag identifying the authority and lifecycle for this Address instance (one of 'title' | 'marketing' | 'inspire'). UFO Quality particularising the Address Substance Kind within Guarino's S001 Q4 'mode of presentation' framing.
addressVariant.definition: The authority-and-lifecycle tag of an Address (one of 'title', 'marketing', or 'inspire') identifying which addressing authority stewards the locator and the lifecycle it follows.

constraints.message: Address addressVariant MUST be a single xsd:string value (one of 'title' | 'marketing' | 'inspire') per ODR-0015 §Rule 6. Distinguishes the authority lifecycle borne by the Address instance.

adHocExpenses.label: ad hoc expenses
adHocExpenses.comment: Statement of ad-hoc service-charge expenses on the leasehold LegalEstate (typed as a string in the data dictionary). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
adHocExpenses.definition: A statement of ad-hoc service-charge expenses on a leasehold LegalEstate.

aged17OrOverNames.label: aged 17 or over names
aged17OrOverNames.comment: Names of occupiers aged 17 or over (other than the Seller) in the Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. Companion to opda:hasOthersAged17OrOver (the Yes/No discriminator).
aged17OrOverNames.definition: The names of the occupiers aged 17 or over, other than the Seller, residing in the Property, as disclosed when opda:hasOthersAged17OrOver is affirmative.

ageRange.label: age range
ageRange.comment: Age range of a nearby school. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the school band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
ageRange.definition: The range of pupil ages catered for by a nearby school.

amount.label: amount
amount.comment: The magnitude of an opda:MonetaryAmount (xsd:decimal) — the numeric dimension of the value structure (the currency dimension is opda:currency). Covers the data-dictionary `amount` leaf (estate rentcharge / service-charge reserve-fund / local-land-charge amounts). Flat per ODR-0008 §Q6a.
amount.definition: The numeric magnitude of a monetary amount: the decimal-valued size dimension of an opda:MonetaryAmount value structure, paired with its currency.

constraints.message: opda:MonetaryAmount MUST carry exactly one opda:amount magnitude (xsd:decimal) — the numeric dimension of the value structure (ODR-0024 R3).

applicationDate.label: application date
applicationDate.comment: Date a planning / building-control application was made (across the local-authority-search decision blocks). xsd:date. ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a.
applicationDate.definition: The date a planning or building-control application was made, as recorded in a local-authority search result.

applicationType.label: application type
applicationType.comment: Type of a planning / building-control application recorded in a local-authority Search result (across the planning-permission, building-regulations, listed-building, conservation, and certificate-of-lawfulness decision blocks). ONE shared property reused across those blocks. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
applicationType.definition: The kind of a planning or building-control application recorded in a local-authority search result.

area.label: area
area.comment: Internal floor area of the Property — a measured UFO Quality (the unit of measure is carried alongside in the source structure). Plain decimal datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
area.definition: The measured internal floor area of a Property.

authorisationToShare.label: authorisation to share
authorisationToShare.comment: Sale-ready declaration: authorisation to share the property pack. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
authorisationToShare.definition: Records a seller's consent to share the information in the sale-ready pack with their legal representative and with the buyer and the buyer's legal representatives.

authorisedToActOnBehalfOfAllSellers.label: authorised to act on behalf of all sellers
authorisedToActOnBehalfOfAllSellers.comment: Sale-ready declaration: is the declarant authorised to act on behalf of all sellers? xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
authorisedToActOnBehalfOfAllSellers.definition: Records a declarant's confirmation of authority to supply data and documents relating to the property on behalf of all of its owners.

bathrooms.label: bathrooms
bathrooms.comment: Number of bathrooms in the Property — a countable UFO Quality. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
bathrooms.definition: The count of bathrooms in a Property.

bedrooms.label: bedrooms
bedrooms.comment: Number of bedrooms in the Property — a countable UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain integer datatype (no enumerated value-space) per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
bedrooms.definition: The count of bedrooms in a Property.

buildingControlStartDate.label: building control start date
buildingControlStartDate.comment: Start date of a building-control matter in a local-authority Search result. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
buildingControlStartDate.definition: The date a building-control matter commenced, as recorded in a local-authority search result.

buildingsReinstatementCostAssessment.label: buildings reinstatement cost assessment
buildingsReinstatementCostAssessment.comment: Buildings reinstatement-cost-assessment statement for the leasehold LegalEstate's buildings insurance (typed as a string in the data dictionary). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
buildingsReinstatementCostAssessment.definition: A buildings reinstatement-cost-assessment statement for a leasehold LegalEstate's buildings insurance.

centralHeatingInstalled.label: central heating installed
centralHeatingInstalled.comment: Central-heating installation indicator for the Property (typed as a string in the data dictionary — a Yes/No-style response). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. A physical-system attribute of the Property.
centralHeatingInstalled.definition: An indicator of whether central heating is installed in a Property.

confirmation.label: confirmation
confirmation.comment: Confirmation flag on a leasehold / managed-freehold confirmation-of-accuracy declaration. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
confirmation.definition: Records a declarant's confirmation on a leasehold or managed-freehold/commonhold confirmation-of-accuracy declaration.

confirmInformationIsAccurate.label: confirm information is accurate
confirmInformationIsAccurate.comment: Declaration confirming the supplied information is accurate (owners' confirmation-of-accuracy + fixtures confirmation). xsd:boolean. ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a.
confirmInformationIsAccurate.definition: Records a declarant's confirmation that the supplied information is accurate to the best of their knowledge, with an undertaking to notify any change before exchange of contracts.

confirmWillProvideAdditionalDocumentatio.label: confirm will provide additional documentation
confirmWillProvideAdditionalDocumentatio.comment: Declaration confirming the owner will provide additional documentation. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
confirmWillProvideAdditionalDocumentatio.definition: Records a declarant's undertaking to provide their property lawyer with additional documentation in support of the information supplied.

consentsObtained.label: consents obtained
consentsObtained.comment: Whether consents were obtained for work under a tree-preservation order. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
consentsObtained.definition: Whether the required consents were obtained for work carried out under a tree-preservation order.

consequentialChargingBasis.label: consequential charging basis
consequentialChargingBasis.comment: Charging basis that would apply consequentially (e.g. on a change of circumstances) for the Property's water/sewerage. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
consequentialChargingBasis.definition: The basis on which a Property's water and sewerage charges would be levied consequentially, such as following a change of circumstances.

consumerProtectionRegulationsResponse.label: consumer protection regulations response
consumerProtectionRegulationsResponse.comment: Declaration response to the Consumer Protection Regulations question. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
consumerProtectionRegulationsResponse.definition: Records a seller's affirmation, under the Consumer Protection Regulations, that the disclosure answers are truthful and accurate to the best of their knowledge.

contributionIncludedInServiceCharge.label: contribution included in service charge
contributionIncludedInServiceCharge.comment: Whether a reserve-fund contribution is included in the service charge. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
contributionIncludedInServiceCharge.definition: Whether a reserve-fund contribution is included within the service charge.

councilSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDays.label: council search turnaround time in working days
councilSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDays.comment: Quoted turnaround time (working days) for a council search. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
councilSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDays.definition: The quoted turnaround time, in working days, for a council search.

councilTaxBand.label: council tax band
councilTaxBand.comment: Council-tax valuation band of the Property per opda:CouncilTaxBandSchemeEW (A–H / Not banded) or opda:CouncilTaxBandSchemeScotland. UFO Quale-in-Region; regulator-sourced enum (VOA / Scottish Assessors). Constrained by SHACL sh:in to the scheme members in the overlay profile, mirroring opda:currentEnergyRating. Flat per §Q6a.
councilTaxBand.definition: The council-tax valuation band of a Property (A to H, or not banded) assigned by the Valuation Office Agency or the Scottish Assessors.

countyCouncil.label: county council
countyCouncil.comment: Name of the county council for the Property's locality (local-authority Search context). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
countyCouncil.definition: The name of the county council for the locality of the property searched.

credibilitySources.label: credibility sources
credibilitySources.comment: Sources lending credibility to a Valuation's price estimate (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
credibilitySources.definition: The sources cited as lending credibility to a valuation's price estimate.

currentChargingBasis.label: current charging basis
currentChargingBasis.comment: Current basis on which the Property's water/sewerage is charged. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
currentChargingBasis.definition: The basis on which a Property's water and sewerage charges are currently levied.

dangerousCladdingOrDefects.label: dangerous cladding or defects
dangerousCladdingOrDefects.comment: Whether there is dangerous cladding or building-safety defects. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
dangerousCladdingOrDefects.definition: Whether a property has dangerous cladding or building-safety defects.

dateInstalled.label: date installed
dateInstalled.comment: Date a Property system was installed (heat pump / off-mains drainage system). xsd:date (a date-valued string in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
dateInstalled.definition: The date on which a Property system, such as a heat pump or off-mains drainage system, was installed.

dateLastEmptied.label: date last emptied
dateLastEmptied.comment: Date the Property's off-mains drainage system was last emptied. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
dateLastEmptied.definition: The date on which a Property's off-mains drainage system was last emptied.

dateLastServiced.label: date last serviced
dateLastServiced.comment: Date the Property's off-mains drainage system was last serviced. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
dateLastServiced.definition: The date on which a Property's off-mains drainage system was last serviced.

dateOfBirth.label: date of birth
dateOfBirth.comment: Date of birth of a Person participant. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a. Part of the Person multi-identifier IC (ODR-0006 §Q1); PII under ODR-0018 (DPV co-annotation in opda-annotations.ttl).
dateOfBirth.definition: The calendar date on which a Person was born — one component of the Person's multi-identifier identity criterion and an item of personal data.

dateRemedialActionRequired.label: date remedial action required
dateRemedialActionRequired.comment: Date by which remedial action is required following a buildings-insurance RiskAssessment. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
dateRemedialActionRequired.definition: The date by which remedial action is required following a buildings-insurance risk assessment of a managed area.

dateReplaced.label: date replaced
dateReplaced.comment: Date the Property's off-mains drainage system was last replaced. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
dateReplaced.definition: The date on which a Property's off-mains drainage system was last replaced.

dateToBeConnected.label: date to be connected
dateToBeConnected.comment: Expected connection date for a not-yet-connected Property utility / service. ONE shared date property reused across the utility blocks. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
dateToBeConnected.definition: The expected date on which a not-yet-connected Property utility or service is to be connected.

dealsWithDayToDayMaintenanceOfManagedAre.label: deals with day-to-day maintenance of managed area
dealsWithDayToDayMaintenanceOfManagedAre.comment: Whether the contact deals with day-to-day maintenance of the managed area. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
dealsWithDayToDayMaintenanceOfManagedAre.definition: Whether a contact is responsible for the day-to-day maintenance of a managed area.

decision.label: decision
decision.comment: Decision recorded on a planning / building-control application in a local-authority Search result. ONE shared property reused across the decision blocks. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
decision.definition: The determination reached on a planning or building-control application in a local-authority search result.

decisionDate.label: decision date
decisionDate.comment: Date a decision was made on a planning / building-control application. xsd:date. ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a.
decisionDate.definition: The date a determination was reached on a planning or building-control application.

designationType.label: designation type
designationType.comment: Type of a planning designation recorded in a local-authority Search result (e.g. conservation area, tree preservation order). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
designationType.definition: The kind of planning designation recorded in a local-authority search result, such as a conservation area or tree-preservation order.

digest.label: digest
digest.comment: Cryptographic digest of a Claim or Evidence (algorithm + value, e.g. 'sha256:e3b0...'). Local term per S009 5-residue (PROV-O has no notion of signature or hash). Algorithm validation by opda:DigestAlgorithmScheme SKOS scheme (ADR-0012 emits the constraint).
digest.definition: Relates a claim or piece of evidence to its cryptographic hash, expressed as an algorithm-qualified digest value drawn from the digest-algorithm concept scheme.

constraints.message: Claim digest MUST be a single xsd:string value when present. The digest hashes the (assertion-content, evidence-set, attestor) tuple per ODR-0009 §Q1.
Evidence digest MUST be a single xsd:string value when present. Provides content-addressable provenance per ODR-0009 §Q1.

diningAreas.label: dining areas
diningAreas.comment: Number of dining areas in the Property. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
diningAreas.definition: The count of dining areas in a Property.

dischargeCompliesWithGBR.label: discharge complies with GBR
dischargeCompliesWithGBR.comment: Whether off-mains drainage discharge complies with the General Binding Rules. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
dischargeCompliesWithGBR.definition: Whether a property's off-mains drainage discharge complies with the General Binding Rules.

disclosureDetail.label: disclosure detail
disclosureDetail.comment: Reusable free-text elaboration slot for a disclosure question (the generic `details` / `comments` / `summary` tail). rdfs:comment-grade — NOT a domain entity and carries no identity criterion (ODR-0022 §Rules.1 Category A). The question being elaborated is carried by the subject node and the instance-level dct:source pointing at that question's schema leaf path; a per-question detail property is NEVER minted (ODR-0022 §Rules.6).
disclosureDetail.definition: The free-text elaboration of a disclosure answer: a reusable comment-grade note whose governing question is fixed by the subject node and the instance-level source, not by the property itself.

constraints.message: The comparable record's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.

The EPC certificate's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
Fixtures-item comment reuses opda:disclosureDetail (A-grade; ODR-0022 §4) — never a per-item comment property.

RiskAssessment result / summary / recommendations are opda:disclosureDetail-grade strings (ODR-0008d Rule 1c); the specific field is carried by the instance-level dct:source, never a per-field property (ODR-0022 §Rules.6).

The search's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.

The survey's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.

The valuation's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.

displayName.label: display name
displayName.comment: Human-readable display name of a document or Search artefact. Domain-less artefact-reference attribute; flat per §Q6a.
displayName.definition: The human-readable name of a document or search artefact.

distanceInMiles.label: distance in miles
distanceInMiles.comment: Distance in miles from the Property to a nearby facility (school / health-care / transport). xsd:decimal. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the proximity relation on the genus), reused across the amenity bands; flat per §Q6a.
distanceInMiles.definition: The distance in miles from a property to a nearby facility.

distanceToNearestSewerageTreatment.label: distance to nearest sewerage treatment
distanceToNearestSewerageTreatment.comment: Distance from the Property to the nearest sewerage-treatment works (typed as a string in the data dictionary — a free-form distance band). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
distanceToNearestSewerageTreatment.definition: The distance from a Property to the nearest sewerage-treatment works.

districtCouncil.label: district council
districtCouncil.comment: Name of the district council for the Property's locality. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
districtCouncil.definition: The name of the district council for the locality of the property searched.

documentDate.label: document date
documentDate.comment: Date of a title / additional document. xsd:date. Domain opda:AttachedDocument (the neutral document bearer; ODR-0024 R7 — an attached doc is NOT evidence by mere attachment; a document plays the evidence role via opda:evidenceType, ODR-0027 §R6); flat per §Q6a.
documentDate.definition: The date borne by a title or additional document attached to a property pack.

documentTypeCode.label: document type code
documentTypeCode.comment: Type code of a title / additional document. Domain opda:AttachedDocument (the neutral document bearer; ODR-0024 R7). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a (no in-data enum; session-028 Q-SKOS keeps it bare); flat per §Q6a.
documentTypeCode.definition: The type code classifying a title or additional document attached to a property pack.

entranceFloor.label: entrance floor
entranceFloor.comment: Floor (storey) on which the Property's entrance is located (0 = ground). Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
entranceFloor.definition: The storey on which a Property's entrance is located, counted from the ground floor as zero.

expectedDeliveryDate.label: expected delivery date
expectedDeliveryDate.comment: Expected delivery date for an ordered Search. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
expectedDeliveryDate.definition: The date by which an ordered search is expected to be delivered.

filedUnder.label: filed under
filedUnder.comment: Filing reference under which a title / additional document is held. Domain opda:AttachedDocument (the neutral document bearer; ODR-0024 R7); flat per §Q6a.
filedUnder.definition: The filing reference under which a title or additional document is held.

forTheManagedAreas.label: for the managed areas
forTheManagedAreas.comment: Portion of the service-charge reserve-fund amount attributable to the managed areas (a numeric split of the reserve fund). xsd:decimal; flat per §Q6a.
forTheManagedAreas.definition: The portion of a service-charge reserve fund attributable to the managed areas.

freeholdOwner.label: freehold owner
freeholdOwner.comment: Freehold owner named in the leasehold ownership-and-management block (a reference/name string, not a Yes/No flag). xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
freeholdOwner.definition: The named freehold owner recorded in a leasehold ownership-and-management block.

from.label: from
from.comment: Start date of a demand / decoration period on the leasehold / managed-freehold LegalEstate (ground-rent, service-charge, or buildings-insurance last-demand period; service-charge last-decorated period). xsd:date. ONE shared period-start property reused across those periods; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: `from` is a generic period-boundary name; reused across the estate's recurring date-range blocks rather than minted per block.)
from.definition: The start date of a demand or decoration period on a leasehold or managed-freehold LegalEstate.

fromTheOwners.label: from the owners
fromTheOwners.comment: Portion of the service-charge reserve-fund amount contributed by the owners (a numeric split of the reserve fund). xsd:decimal; flat per §Q6a.
fromTheOwners.definition: The portion of a service-charge reserve fund contributed by the owners.

groundRentFrequency.label: ground rent frequency
groundRentFrequency.comment: Frequency at which ground rent is payable on the leasehold LegalEstate (typed as a string in the data dictionary — a free-form frequency label). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
groundRentFrequency.definition: The frequency at which ground rent is payable on a leasehold LegalEstate.

handoverOnCompletion.label: handover on completion
handoverOnCompletion.comment: Whether the Property's smart-home systems will be handed over on completion. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
handoverOnCompletion.definition: A boolean recording whether a Property's smart-home systems will be handed over to the buyer on completion.

hasFixedRentcharge.label: has fixed rentcharge
hasFixedRentcharge.comment: Whether the managed-freehold / commonhold LegalEstate carries a fixed rentcharge (a Yes/No-style string response). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasFixedRentcharge.definition: An indicator of whether a managed-freehold or commonhold LegalEstate carries a fixed rentcharge.

hasFloodDefences.label: has flood defences
hasFloodDefences.comment: Whether the Property has flood defences. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasFloodDefences.definition: Whether a property has flood defences.

hasFloorplan.label: has floorplan
hasFloorplan.comment: Whether a floorplan is available for the Property. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasFloorplan.definition: Whether a floorplan is available for a property.

hasHelpToBuyEquityLoan.label: has Help to Buy equity loan
hasHelpToBuyEquityLoan.comment: Whether the Property has a Help to Buy equity loan. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasHelpToBuyEquityLoan.definition: Whether a property is subject to a Help to Buy equity loan.

hasLift.label: has lift
hasLift.comment: Whether the Property (building) has a lift. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasLift.definition: Whether the building containing a property has a lift.

hasOthersAged17OrOver.label: has others aged 17 or over
hasOthersAged17OrOver.comment: Yes/No discriminator: does the Seller's household include occupiers aged 17 or over (other than the Seller)? BASPI5 occupiers question. Bound to opda:YesNoScheme.
hasOthersAged17OrOver.definition: Relates a Seller to a Yes/No value recording whether the Property's household includes occupiers aged 17 or over other than the Seller — the BASPI5 occupiers discriminator gating disclosure of those occupiers' names.

hasSpecialCategoryData.label: has special-category data
hasSpecialCategoryData.comment: Flag indicating that a record carries GDPR Article 9 / 10 special-category personal data (race, religion, health, sex life, sexual orientation, political opinion, trade-union membership, biometric/genetic data, criminal convictions). Domain unconstrained at foundation scope so the predicate may be borne by Person records (the typical case targeted by the Cat 4 SHACL shape in opda-agent-shapes.ttl) or by any other Kind that carries article-9/10 data downstream. Engineering placeholder pending S012 Q3 Council ratification of the canonical predicate name.
hasSpecialCategoryData.definition: Asserts whether a record carries GDPR Article 9 or 10 special-category personal data, serving as the target predicate for the special-category lawful-basis SHACL constraint.

hasTenantCompanyDissolved.label: has tenant company dissolved
hasTenantCompanyDissolved.comment: Whether the tenant management company has been dissolved. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
hasTenantCompanyDissolved.definition: Whether the tenant management company for an estate has been dissolved.

hasUPRN.label: has UPRN
hasUPRN.comment: Unique Property Reference Number — OS AddressBase identifier. Per ODR-0005 §6a a contingent administrative identifier under PROV-O succession; NOT a load-bearing identity criterion. Operationally checkable via dash:uniqueValueForClass (ADR-0012 emits the shape).
hasUPRN.definition: The Unique Property Reference Number assigned to a Property in OS AddressBase: a contingent administrative identifier subject to provenance-tracked succession, not a load-bearing identity criterion for the property.

constraints.message: Property hasUPRN, when present, MUST be a single xsd:string value. Absence is admissible (UPRN is a contingent administrative identifier per ODR-0005 §6a); succession is tracked by the UPRNSuccessionRule SHACL-AF rule below.

heading.label: heading
heading.comment: Google Street View point-of-view compass heading (degrees) for the Property's map locator. xsd:decimal — a numeric camera parameter, NOT a free-text tail (FLAG: deviates from the generic free-text-collapse expectation; the data dictionary types it as a number). Flat per §Q6a.
heading.definition: The compass heading, in degrees, of the Google Street View camera position for a Property's map locator.

headLeaseholderControlled.label: head leaseholder controlled
headLeaseholderControlled.comment: Whether the head lease is leaseholder-controlled. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
headLeaseholderControlled.definition: Whether the head lease of an estate is leaseholder-controlled.

heatingLastServicedDate.label: heating last serviced date
heatingLastServicedDate.comment: Date the Property's central-heating system was last serviced. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
heatingLastServicedDate.definition: The date on which a Property's central-heating system was last serviced.

isConnectedToNationalGrid.label: is connected to national grid
isConnectedToNationalGrid.comment: Whether the Property's solar panels are connected to the national grid. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isConnectedToNationalGrid.definition: Whether a property's solar panels are connected to the national grid.

isFirstRegistration.label: is first registration
isFirstRegistration.comment: Whether the sale is a first registration of the title. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isFirstRegistration.definition: Whether a sale constitutes the first registration of the title.

isHMO.label: is HMO
isHMO.comment: Whether the Property is a House in Multiple Occupation. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isHMO.definition: Whether a property is a House in Multiple Occupation.

isLeaseQualifying.label: is lease qualifying
isLeaseQualifying.comment: Whether the lease is a qualifying lease under the Building Safety Act. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isLeaseQualifying.definition: Whether a lease is a qualifying lease under the Building Safety Act.

isLimitedCompanySale.label: is limited company sale
isLimitedCompanySale.comment: Whether the seller is a limited company. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isLimitedCompanySale.definition: Whether the seller in a sale is a limited company.

isManagingAgentEmployed.label: is managing agent employed
isManagingAgentEmployed.comment: Whether a managing agent is employed for the estate. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isManagingAgentEmployed.definition: Whether a managing agent is employed to manage an estate.

isPIIBearing.label: is PII bearing
isPIIBearing.comment: Flag marking a class as a bearer of personally identifiable information under the ODR-0012 Phase-1 floor. A class asserted opda:isPIIBearing true is in scope for the Phase-1 PII-co-annotation discipline (ODR-0018 §Rule 1): it MUST carry a class-level dpv-pd:hasPersonalDataCategory baseline in opda-<module>-annotations.ttl. The cross-cutting SHACL-AF rule PIIWithoutDPVCoAnnotationRule flags any opda:isPIIBearing true class lacking that co-annotation as a sh:Warning breach. Range xsd:boolean; emitted true on exactly the baseline PII-bearing Kinds (Person, Property, Address, RegisteredTitle, Claim, EPCCertificate) — Organisation is intentionally unmarked (ODR-0006 §Q6: not a data subject).
isPIIBearing.definition: Asserts whether a class bears personally identifiable information under the Phase-1 floor, placing it in scope for the mandatory data-protection category co-annotation discipline.

isStudentAccommodation.label: is student accommodation
isStudentAccommodation.comment: Whether the Property is student accommodation. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
isStudentAccommodation.definition: Whether a property is student accommodation.

kitchens.label: kitchens
kitchens.comment: Number of kitchens in the Property. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
kitchens.definition: The count of kitchens in a Property.

landlordInsuresIfFlat.label: landlord insures if flat
landlordInsuresIfFlat.comment: Whether the landlord arranges buildings insurance (flat). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
landlordInsuresIfFlat.definition: Whether the landlord arranges buildings insurance for a flat.

landlordNotifiedOfSale.label: landlord notified of sale
landlordNotifiedOfSale.comment: Whether the landlord has been notified of the sale (Building Safety Act). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
landlordNotifiedOfSale.definition: Whether the landlord has been notified of a sale under the Building Safety Act.

lastMaintained.label: last maintained
lastMaintained.comment: Date the Property's solar-panel system was last maintained. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
lastMaintained.definition: The date on which a Property's solar-panel system was last maintained.

leaveKeys.label: leave keys
leaveKeys.comment: Completion undertaking: will the seller leave the keys? xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a. A sale-Transaction completion attribute (ODR-0007).
leaveKeys.definition: Records a seller's undertaking to leave keys for all door and window locks, with any alarm codes, for the buyer on the day of completion.

length.label: length
length.comment: Length of a room in metres (xsd:decimal) — a Quale-in-Region field of the opda:RoomDimension value structure. Metres by convention (NO opda:UnitOfLengthScheme — session-030 / ODR-0024 R10, reusing the opda:area no-unit-scheme precedent). Flat per ODR-0008 §Q6a.
length.definition: The length of a room in metres, recorded as a field of an opda:RoomDimension value structure.

constraints.message: opda:RoomDimension length (metres) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

lengthOfLeaseInYears.label: length of lease in years
lengthOfLeaseInYears.comment: Length of the leasehold term in years (the granted term). Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. Complements opda:LeaseTerm (the OWL-Time interval) with the headline term-length figure.
lengthOfLeaseInYears.definition: The length in years of the term granted on a leasehold LegalEstate.

listedDate.label: listed date
listedDate.comment: Date a comparable property was listed for sale. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
listedDate.definition: The date a comparable property was listed for sale, as recorded in valuation comparable listing information.

localAuthorityName.label: local authority name
localAuthorityName.comment: Name of the local authority that issued / governs a Search. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
localAuthorityName.definition: The name of the local authority that issued or governs a search.

localAuthorityReference.label: local authority reference
localAuthorityReference.comment: Reference identifying a Search within the local authority's system. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
localAuthorityReference.definition: The reference identifying a search within its local authority's record system.

location.label: location
location.comment: Physical-location description of a Property fixture or measurement point — electricity / gas / water meter, stopcock, or survey/charge locus (typed as a free-form string in the data dictionary). ONE shared location-description property reused across those points. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: `propertyPack.location` is itself a structured geo block, not this leaf-level string; the structured locator is opda:Address territory — ODR-0015 — and is out of this leaf's scope.)
location.definition: A free-text description of the physical position of a Property fixture or measurement point, such as a meter or stopcock.

loftBoarded.label: loft boarded
loftBoarded.comment: Whether the Property's loft is boarded. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
loftBoarded.definition: Whether a property's loft is boarded.

loftInsulated.label: loft insulated
loftInsulated.comment: Whether the Property's loft is insulated. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
loftInsulated.definition: Whether a property's loft is insulated.

logbookProvider.label: logbook provider
logbookProvider.comment: Name of the digital-property-logbook provider for the Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
logbookProvider.definition: The name of the provider of a Property's digital property logbook.

managementPlanInPlace.label: management plan in place
managementPlanInPlace.comment: Whether a Japanese-knotweed management plan is in place. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
managementPlanInPlace.definition: Whether a management plan is in place for Japanese knotweed affecting a property.

mediaUrl.label: media URL
mediaUrl.comment: URL of a media item (property image / floorplan / etc.). xsd:anyURI. Domain-less artefact-reference attribute; flat per §Q6a.
mediaUrl.definition: The web address locating a media item such as a property image or floorplan.

constraints.message: opda:mediaUrl (media URL) MUST be a well-formed http(s) URI (sh:datatype xsd:anyURI + URI sh:pattern). The property is rdfs:domain-less (cross-artefact reference; ODR-0024 R11 / session-028 Q5) — this shape constrains its value-space via sh:targetSubjectsOf rather than a bearer class.

middleNames.label: middle names
middleNames.comment: Middle name(s) of a Person legal owner. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
middleNames.definition: The middle name or names of a Person, between the given name and the surname, as recorded for a legal owner.

mpan.label: MPAN
mpan.comment: Meter Point Administration Number — the electricity supply-point identifier for the Property. xsd:string (a fixed-width numeric identifier whose leading zeros are significant — the same convention opda:hasUPRN follows, NOT xsd:integer despite the data-dictionary typing). Flat per §Q6a.
mpan.definition: The Meter Point Administration Number identifying a Property's electricity supply point.

mprn.label: MPRN
mprn.comment: Meter Point Reference Number — the gas supply-point identifier for the Property. xsd:string (a fixed-width numeric identifier, per the opda:hasUPRN / opda:mpan convention, NOT xsd:integer). Flat per §Q6a.
mprn.definition: The Meter Point Reference Number identifying a Property's gas supply point.

name.label: name
name.comment: Generic name/label of a named entity — a participant, school, road, contract template, health-care facility, transport node, or planning designation. ONE shared naming property with NO rdfs:domain: it recurs across 46 polysemous occurrences with no single rigid bearer Kind (the domain-less shared-property convention opda:price / opda:inclusionStatus follow). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: polysemous; left domain-less by design rather than forcing one bearer.)
name.definition: The proper name or label of a named entity — used across polysemous contexts (participant, school, road, contract template, health-care facility, transport node, or planning designation) as a shared naming property with no single bearer kind.

numberOfFloors.label: number of floors
numberOfFloors.comment: Number of floors (storeys) the Property comprises. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
numberOfFloors.definition: The count of floors (storeys) a Property comprises.

numberOfNonUkResidentSellers.label: number of non-UK-resident sellers
numberOfNonUkResidentSellers.comment: Count of selling parties who are non-UK-resident (relevant to SDLT / withholding). Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: ownership-aggregate count; placed on opda:Proprietorship.)
numberOfNonUkResidentSellers.definition: The number of selling parties in the ownership who are not resident in the UK — a subset of the owner-set bearing on tax and withholding obligations.

numberOfPropertiesSharing.label: number of properties sharing
numberOfPropertiesSharing.comment: Number of other properties sharing the Property's off-mains drainage system. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
numberOfPropertiesSharing.definition: The count of other properties sharing a Property's off-mains drainage system.

numberOfSellers.label: number of sellers
numberOfSellers.comment: Count of the selling parties in the ownership (the cardinality of the owner-set the Proprietorship Relator mediates). Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: ownership-aggregate count; placed on opda:Proprietorship.)
numberOfSellers.definition: The number of selling parties in the ownership — the cardinality of the owner-set the Proprietorship mediates.

occurredAtTime.label: occurred at time
occurredAtTime.comment: Actual completion instant of an event (informational alias for prov:atTime on opda:Milestone Activities where the consumer prefers an opda-namespaced predicate). PROV-O prov:atTime is the canonical W3C form; this predicate sits alongside for round-trip convenience with PDTF v3 schemas that use 'occurredAt' naming.
occurredAtTime.definition: Records the actual instant at which a transaction milestone event took place.

constraints.message: Transaction identity-key surface: occurredAtTime MUST be a single xsd:dateTime value when present. The full Transaction-as-Relator IC per ODR-0007 §Q1 is the (mediated-bearers, founding-event) tuple; this shape covers the founding-event timestamp.

orderDate.label: order date
orderDate.comment: Date a Search was ordered. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
orderDate.definition: The date a search was ordered.

organisationName.label: organisation name
organisationName.comment: Name of an Organisation — a legal owner's registered/trading name, or the organisation a participant is acting for / belongs to. ONE shared property: the same opda:organisationName serves both leaves (Linked-Data shared-property pattern; supersedes the former opda:organisation, renamed-by-merge per ADR-0044 to remove the case-clash with the opda:Organisation class). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
organisationName.definition: The registered or trading name of an Organisation — whether a legal owner or the organisation a participant acts for or belongs to.

organisationReference.label: organisation reference
organisationReference.comment: Reference identifying an Organisation participant within an external system. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
organisationReference.definition: An identifier by which an Organisation participant is referenced within an external system.

organisesBuildingInsurance.label: organises building insurance
organisesBuildingInsurance.comment: Whether the service contact organises buildings insurance. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
organisesBuildingInsurance.definition: Whether a service contact organises buildings insurance for an estate.

otherCentralHeatingFuelType.label: other central heating fuel type
otherCentralHeatingFuelType.comment: Free-text fuel classifier captured when the central-heating fuel is 'Other' (the open-ended companion to opda:centralHeatingFuelType). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
otherCentralHeatingFuelType.definition: The free-text fuel classifier captured for a Property whose central-heating fuel is recorded as 'Other'.

otherHeatingFeatures.label: other heating features
otherHeatingFeatures.comment: Additional heating features of the Property (a multi-valued list in the data dictionary — each value an xsd:string). UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
otherHeatingFeatures.definition: An additional heating feature of a Property beyond its primary heating system.

otherOwnershipDetails.label: other ownership details
otherOwnershipDetails.comment: Free-text ownership details captured when the ownership type is 'Other' for the LegalEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
otherOwnershipDetails.definition: The free-text ownership details captured for a LegalEstate whose ownership type is recorded as 'Other'.

otherPropertiesInManagedArea.label: other properties in managed area
otherPropertiesInManagedArea.comment: Count of other properties in the managed area sharing the leasehold LegalEstate's service arrangements. xsd:decimal (typed as a number in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
otherPropertiesInManagedArea.definition: The count of other properties in the managed area sharing a leasehold LegalEstate's service arrangements.

otherRating.label: other rating
otherRating.comment: Other (non-Ofsted) rating of a nearby school. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the school band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
otherRating.definition: The rating of a nearby school awarded by a body other than Ofsted.

otherType.label: other type
otherType.comment: Free-text classifier captured when the Property's built-form / property-type is 'Other' (the open-ended companion to opda:propertyType). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
otherType.definition: The free-text property-type classifier captured for a Property whose property type is recorded as 'Other'.

outsideAreas.label: outside areas
outsideAreas.comment: Outside areas of the Property — garden / yard / balcony / etc. (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
outsideAreas.definition: An outside area belonging to a Property, such as a garden, yard, or balcony.

outstandingEnforcementAction.label: outstanding enforcement action
outstandingEnforcementAction.comment: Whether there is outstanding enforcement action (managed-area risk assessment). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
outstandingEnforcementAction.definition: Whether there is outstanding enforcement action recorded in a managed-area risk assessment.

parkingArrangements.label: parking arrangements
parkingArrangements.comment: Parking arrangements for the Property — allocated / on-street / garage / etc. (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
parkingArrangements.definition: A parking arrangement available to a Property, such as allocated, on-street, or garage parking.

personWhoDealsWithTheDeedOfCovenant.label: person who deals with the deed of covenant
personWhoDealsWithTheDeedOfCovenant.comment: Name/role of the person who deals with the deed of covenant for the leasehold / managed-freehold LegalEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
personWhoDealsWithTheDeedOfCovenant.definition: The name or role of the person who deals with the deed of covenant on a leasehold or managed-freehold LegalEstate.

pitch.label: pitch
pitch.comment: Google Street View point-of-view pitch (degrees) for the Property's map locator. xsd:decimal numeric camera parameter. Flat per §Q6a.
pitch.definition: The vertical pitch, in degrees, of the Google Street View camera position for a Property's map locator.

plannedAtTime.label: planned at time
plannedAtTime.comment: Expected completion timestamp on a prov:Plan companion to an opda:Milestone Activity. Per S007 Q6 PROV-O Plan-vs-Activity reification, the planned time lives on the Plan resource and the actual time lives on the Activity; the Plan is linked from the Activity via prov:qualifiedAssociation → prov:Association → prov:hadPlan. The Cagle opda:MilestoneVarianceRule (ADR-0012) materialises variance into the validation report at sh:Info (under 14 days) or sh:Warning (over 14 days).
plannedAtTime.definition: Records the expected instant at which a planned transaction milestone is forecast to occur, carried on the plan companion to the milestone for expected-versus-actual variance.

constraints.message: Milestone plannedAtTime MUST be a single xsd:dateTime value when present. The variance against occurredAtTime is tracked by the MilestoneVarianceRule SHACL-AF rule below.

planningStartDate.label: planning start date
planningStartDate.comment: Start date of a planning matter in a local-authority Search result. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
planningStartDate.definition: The date a planning matter commenced, as recorded in a local-authority search result.

price.label: price
price.comment: Monetary amount asked for a fixtures-and-fittings item included in a sale (a number in the data dictionary). A single shared fixtures monetary amount reused across all fixtures items — ODR-0022 §4 forbids minting one price property per item. Bound on the transaction-scoped fixtures-list node alongside opda:inclusionStatus. The Category-D fixtures amount ONLY — the Category-G headline / recurring / refundable monetary leaves (asking price, ground rent, deposit, service charge, fee …) do NOT reuse it (ODR-0022 §1 / G1). The value-structured opda:MonetaryAmount value type now EXISTS (the Category-G monetary walk, ODR-0024 R3); opda:price deliberately remains a single-currency interim decimal for the fixtures amount and is NOT migrated to it.
price.definition: The amount asked for a fixtures-and-fittings item included in a sale: a single shared single-currency monetary figure scoped to fixtures-and-fittings only, distinct from the headline and recurring monetary leaves.

constraints.message: Fixtures-item opda:price is the shared monetary-amount property (one property reused across all items; ODR-0022 §4 — never one price property per item).

pricingMethodology.label: pricing methodology
pricingMethodology.comment: Methodology used to derive a Valuation's price estimate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
pricingMethodology.definition: The method used to derive a valuation's price estimate.

procedureForObtainingCertificate.label: procedure for obtaining certificate
procedureForObtainingCertificate.comment: Procedure for obtaining a transfer/registration certificate on the leasehold / managed-freehold LegalEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
procedureForObtainingCertificate.definition: The procedure for obtaining a transfer or registration certificate on a leasehold or managed-freehold LegalEstate.

productCode.label: product code
productCode.comment: Provider product code identifying a Search product. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
productCode.definition: The provider's product code identifying a particular search product.

propertiesContributingToMaintenanceOfMan.label: properties contributing to maintenance of managed area
propertiesContributingToMaintenanceOfMan.comment: Count of properties contributing to maintenance of the managed area for the leasehold LegalEstate. xsd:decimal (a number in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
propertiesContributingToMaintenanceOfMan.definition: The count of properties contributing to maintenance of the managed area for a leasehold LegalEstate.

providerName.label: provider name
providerName.comment: Name of the Search provider. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
providerName.definition: The name of the organisation that supplied a search.

providerReference.label: provider reference
providerReference.comment: Provider's reference for a Search. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
providerReference.definition: The provider's own reference for a search.

publicSewerMapAttached.label: public sewer map attached
publicSewerMapAttached.comment: Whether the public-sewer map is attached for the Property (a Yes/No-style string response in the data dictionary). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
publicSewerMapAttached.definition: An indicator of whether the public-sewer map is attached for a Property.

pupils.label: pupils
pupils.comment: Number of pupils at a nearby school. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the school band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
pupils.definition: The number of pupils enrolled at a nearby school.

receptions.label: receptions
receptions.comment: Number of reception rooms in the Property. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
receptions.definition: The count of reception rooms in a Property.

reference.label: reference
reference.comment: Payment reference for a contact organisation's bank account. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: bank-details domain.)
reference.definition: The payment reference to quote when remitting funds to a contact Organisation's bank account.

refNumber.label: reference number
refNumber.comment: Application/case reference number on a planning / building-control result. ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a.
refNumber.definition: The application or case reference identifying a planning or building-control matter in a search result.

regulatedSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDa.label: regulated search turnaround time in working days
regulatedSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDa.comment: Quoted turnaround time (working days) for a regulated search. Plain integer datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
regulatedSearchTurnaroundTimeInWorkingDa.definition: The quoted turnaround time, in working days, for a regulated search.

religiousCharacter.label: religious character
religiousCharacter.comment: Religious character of a nearby school. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the school band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
religiousCharacter.definition: The religious affiliation, if any, of a nearby school.

removeRubbish.label: remove rubbish
removeRubbish.comment: Completion undertaking: will the seller remove rubbish? xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
removeRubbish.definition: Records a seller's undertaking to remove all rubbish and items not included in the sale and to leave the property in a clean and tidy condition on completion.

rentIncreaseCalculated.label: rent increase calculated
rentIncreaseCalculated.comment: How a ground-rent increase is calculated on the leasehold LegalEstate (e.g. RPI-linked, doubling). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
rentIncreaseCalculated.definition: How a ground-rent increase is calculated on a leasehold LegalEstate, such as by RPI-linking or doubling.

rentReviewFrequency.label: rent review frequency
rentReviewFrequency.comment: Frequency at which ground rent is reviewed on the leasehold LegalEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
rentReviewFrequency.definition: The frequency at which ground rent is reviewed on a leasehold LegalEstate.

replaceLightFittings.label: replace light fittings
replaceLightFittings.comment: Completion undertaking: will the seller replace removed light fittings? xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
replaceLightFittings.definition: Records a seller's undertaking to replace any removed light fittings with a ceiling rose, flex, bulb holder and bulb on completion.

reportDate.label: report date
reportDate.comment: Date a Search / survey report was produced. xsd:date. ONE shared property reused across search and survey reports; flat per §Q6a.
reportDate.definition: The date a search or survey report was produced.

requirements.label: requirements
requirements.comment: Requirements stated for a licence-to-assign on the leasehold LegalEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
requirements.definition: The requirements stated for a licence to assign a leasehold LegalEstate.

response.label: response
response.comment: Response flag on a managed-freehold / commonhold confirmation. xsd:boolean (a confirmation response; the data dictionary leaves the type unset — it is a yes/no confirmation by structure). Flat per §Q6a.
response.definition: Records a declarant's affirmation, on a managed-freehold or commonhold confirmation, of authority to provide the information on behalf of the selected parties and that a buyer may rely on it.

retrievedOn.label: retrieved on
retrievedOn.comment: Date a title / additional document was retrieved from the registry. xsd:date. Domain opda:AttachedDocument (the neutral document bearer; ODR-0024 R7); flat per §Q6a.
retrievedOn.definition: The date a title or additional document was retrieved from the registry.

roomName.label: room name
roomName.comment: Name of a room (xsd:string) — a NON-RIGID label on the opda:RoomDimension value structure, NOT an identity principle and never a key (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030). Flat per ODR-0008 §Q6a.
roomName.definition: The non-rigid label naming a room within an opda:RoomDimension value structure, never an identity principle or key.

constraints.message: opda:RoomDimension roomName (non-rigid label) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

saleAtUndervalue.label: sale at undervalue
saleAtUndervalue.comment: Whether the sale is at undervalue. Yes/No disclosure (price information); xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
saleAtUndervalue.definition: Whether a sale is being made at undervalue.

schoolType.label: school type
schoolType.comment: Band of a nearby school per opda:SchoolTypeScheme (College / Nursery / Primary / Secondary / Private). Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the school band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). ONE shared datatype property over the SchoolTypeScheme value-space — replaces the five range-less generic object properties (opda:college / nursery / primary / secondary / private) the council rejected as permanent-namespace landmines (session-028 Q1). Constrained by SHACL sh:in to the scheme members in the overlay profile. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
schoolType.definition: The educational stage of a nearby school: its band within the opda:SchoolTypeScheme value-space (College, Nursery, Primary, Secondary, or Private).

sellerCompletedDeedOfCertificate.label: seller completed deed of certificate
sellerCompletedDeedOfCertificate.comment: Whether the seller completed a deed of certificate (Building Safety Act). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sellerCompletedDeedOfCertificate.definition: Whether the seller completed a deed of certificate under the Building Safety Act.

sellerOwnedProperty.label: seller owned property
sellerOwnedProperty.comment: Whether the seller owned the property for enfranchisement qualification. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sellerOwnedProperty.definition: Whether the seller has owned the property long enough to satisfy enfranchisement qualification.

sellersCapacityDetails.label: sellers capacity details
sellersCapacityDetails.comment: Free-text detail elaborating a Seller's asserted capacity (companion to opda:hasAssertedCapacity, ODR-0006 §Q4). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sellersCapacityDetails.definition: Free-text narrative elaborating the capacity in which a Seller is selling, supplementing the coded value carried by opda:hasAssertedCapacity.

sellingAgent.label: selling agent
sellingAgent.comment: Name of the selling agent on an onward-purchase link in the transaction chain. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sellingAgent.definition: Names the estate agent selling the property on an onward-purchase link of a transaction chain.

sewerageBills.label: sewerage bills
sewerageBills.comment: Free-text sewerage-billing description for the Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sewerageBills.definition: A description of the sewerage-billing arrangements for a Property.

sewerageProvider.label: sewerage provider
sewerageProvider.comment: Name of the Property's sewerage provider. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
sewerageProvider.definition: The name of the undertaker providing sewerage services to a Property.

sharedOwnershipPercentage.label: shared ownership percentage
sharedOwnershipPercentage.comment: Percentage of the Property owned under a shared-ownership leasehold LegalEstate. xsd:decimal (a number in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
sharedOwnershipPercentage.definition: The percentage of a Property owned under a shared-ownership leasehold LegalEstate.

signedOn.label: signed on
signedOn.comment: Date a contract / sale-ready declaration was signed. xsd:date. ONE shared property reused across contract and seller signatures; flat per §Q6a.
signedOn.definition: Records the date on which a contract or sale-ready declaration was signed.

soldDate.label: sold date
soldDate.comment: Date a comparable property was sold (valuation comparable listing info). xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
soldDate.definition: The date a comparable property was sold, as recorded in valuation comparable listing information.

sortCode.label: sort code
sortCode.comment: Bank sort code of a contact organisation. xsd:string. ONE shared property; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: bank-details domain.)
sortCode.definition: The six-digit UK bank sort code identifying the branch holding a contact Organisation's bank account.

specialties.label: specialties
specialties.comment: Specialties of a nearby health-care facility (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the health-care band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
specialties.definition: The clinical specialties offered by a nearby health-care facility.

startYearOfLease.label: start year of lease
startYearOfLease.comment: Calendar year the leasehold term commenced. xsd:gYear (a year value in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
startYearOfLease.definition: The calendar year in which the term of a leasehold LegalEstate commenced.

status.label: status
status.comment: Status of a search-derived result item — planning permission, designation plan, road-adoption status, or search-order status. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: polysemous across those contexts; placed on opda:Search; the data dictionary's three context-specific status enums are sh:in-restricted per-context in the overlay profile, not unified into one value-space.)
status.definition: The current state of a search-derived item — a planning permission, designation plan, road-adoption entry, or search order.

statusDate.label: status date
statusDate.comment: Date a designation plan's status was set in a local-authority Search result. xsd:date. Flat per §Q6a.
statusDate.definition: The date on which a designation plan's status was set in a local-authority search result.

subCategory.label: sub-category
subCategory.comment: Sub-category of an environmental-peril RiskAssessment (riskSubcategories[] across the climate / coal-mining / flooding / ground-stability / radon / etc. peril blocks). ONE shared property on opda:RiskAssessment. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
subCategory.definition: The named sub-division of an environmental-peril risk assessment, drawn from the peril's riskSubcategories list.

supplier.label: supplier
supplier.comment: Name of the supplier for a Property utility / service (electricity, gas-fuel, heat-pump, solar, water, drainage, telephone, cable/satellite TV). ONE shared supplier-name property reused across the utility blocks (the data dictionary repeats the same `supplier` leaf under each). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
supplier.definition: The name of the supplier of a Property utility or service, such as electricity, gas, water, drainage, telephone, or television.

supplyClassification.label: supply classification
supplyClassification.comment: Classification of the Property's water supply (e.g. metered / unmetered / rateable). A UFO Quale-in-Region of the physical Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a (no ontology-governed enum in the data dictionary); flat per §Q6a.
supplyClassification.definition: The classification of a Property's water supply, such as metered, unmetered, or rateable.

takeReasonableCare.label: take reasonable care
takeReasonableCare.comment: Completion undertaking: will the seller take reasonable care of the Property until completion? xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
takeReasonableCare.definition: Records a seller's undertaking to take reasonable care when removing fittings or contents from the property before completion.

titleExtents.label: title extents
titleExtents.comment: Statement of the extents covered by a title to be sold. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
titleExtents.definition: A statement of the extents covered by a title to be sold.

titleNumber.label: title number
titleNumber.comment: HMLR title number — identifies the registered-title RECORD (opda:RegisteredTitle), not the legal estate (ODR-0024 R8 / session-028 Q6). The estate has no title number; the record does — reach the estate via opda:recordsEstate. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
titleNumber.definition: The HM Land Registry title number identifying a RegisteredTitle record (not the legal estate it documents), unique within the register.

titlePropertyDescription.label: title property description
titlePropertyDescription.comment: The property description as recorded on the title for the LegalEstate to be transferred. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
titlePropertyDescription.definition: The property description recorded on the title for a LegalEstate to be transferred.

to.label: to
to.comment: End date of a demand / decoration period on the leasehold / managed-freehold LegalEstate (mirror of opda:from). xsd:date. ONE shared period-end property reused across those periods; flat per §Q6a. (FLAG: `to` is a generic period-boundary name; reused across the estate's recurring date-range blocks.)
to.definition: The end date of a demand or decoration period on a leasehold or managed-freehold LegalEstate.

transactionId.label: transaction ID
transactionId.comment: External transaction identifier (the PDTF transaction id; also carried on onward-purchase chain links). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. Complements the opda:Transaction IC's transaction-id-lineage (ODR-0007 §Q1) — the notation surface for the identifier.
transactionId.definition: Identifies a property transaction by its externally assigned PDTF identifier, a UUID also carried on onward-purchase chain links.

typeOfFlooding.label: type of flooding
typeOfFlooding.comment: Type(s) of historical flooding the Property has experienced (a multi-valued list — each value an xsd:string). UFO Quality of the physical Property. Plain multi-valued string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a. (The per-peril flood RISK ASSESSMENT is opda:RiskAssessment territory; this is the factual historical-flooding-type attribute.)
typeOfFlooding.definition: A type of historical flooding a Property has experienced, such as river, surface-water, or groundwater flooding.

typeOfHealthCare.label: type of health care
typeOfHealthCare.comment: Type of a nearby health-care facility. Domain opda:NearbyFacility (the genus bearer; the health-care band is SHACL-scoped per ODR-0024 R4). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a (no ontology-governed enum in the data dictionary); flat per §Q6a.
typeOfHealthCare.definition: The category of a nearby health-care facility.

unitaryAuthority.label: unitary authority
unitaryAuthority.comment: Name of the unitary authority for the Property's locality. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
unitaryAuthority.definition: The name of the unitary authority for the locality of the property searched.

urgentWorksCarriedOut.label: urgent works carried out
urgentWorksCarriedOut.comment: Whether urgent works were carried out (managed-area risk assessment). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
urgentWorksCarriedOut.definition: Whether urgent works were carried out, as recorded in a managed-area risk assessment.

urgentWorksRecommended.label: urgent works recommended
urgentWorksRecommended.comment: Whether urgent works were recommended (managed-area risk assessment). Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
urgentWorksRecommended.definition: Whether urgent works were recommended, as recorded in a managed-area risk assessment.

url.label: URL
url.comment: URL of an external artefact (contract template, planning-permission page). xsd:anyURI. Domain-less artefact-reference attribute; flat per §Q6a.
url.definition: The web address locating an external artefact such as a contract template or planning-permission page.

constraints.message: opda:url (URL) MUST be a well-formed http(s) URI (sh:datatype xsd:anyURI + URI sh:pattern). The property is rdfs:domain-less (cross-artefact reference; ODR-0024 R11 / session-028 Q5) — this shape constrains its value-space via sh:targetSubjectsOf rather than a bearer class.

waterBills.label: water bills
waterBills.comment: Free-text water-billing description for the Property. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
waterBills.definition: A description of the water-billing arrangements for a Property.

waterProvider.label: water provider
waterProvider.comment: Name of the Property's water-supply provider. Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
waterProvider.definition: The name of the undertaker supplying water to a Property.

waterworksMapAttached.label: waterworks map attached
waterworksMapAttached.comment: Whether the waterworks map is attached for the Property (a Yes/No-style string response). Plain string datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
waterworksMapAttached.definition: An indicator of whether the waterworks map is attached for a Property.

width.label: width
width.comment: Width of a room in metres (xsd:decimal) — a Quale-in-Region field of the opda:RoomDimension value structure. Metres by convention (no opda:UnitOfLengthScheme). Flat per ODR-0008 §Q6a.
width.definition: The width of a room in metres, recorded as a field of an opda:RoomDimension value structure.

constraints.message: opda:RoomDimension width (metres) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

willHandoverLogbook.label: will handover logbook
willHandoverLogbook.comment: Whether the seller will hand over the digital property logbook on completion. xsd:boolean. Flat per §Q6a.
willHandoverLogbook.definition: A boolean recording whether the seller will hand over a Property's digital property logbook on completion.

willingToInsure.label: willing to insure
