willingToInsure.comment: Whether an insurer is willing to insure against an unresolved planning issue. Yes/No disclosure; xsd:string per §Q5a; flat per §Q6a.
willingToInsure.definition: Whether an insurer is willing to insure against an unresolved planning issue affecting a property.

year.label: year
year.comment: Calendar year of a service-charge last-decorated period (externally / internally) on the leasehold LegalEstate. xsd:gYear. Flat per §Q6a.
year.definition: The calendar year of a service-charge last-decorated period on a leasehold LegalEstate.

yearCompleted.label: year completed
yearCompleted.comment: Calendar year a Property alteration / change was completed (change of use, conservatory addition, window replacement since 2002). xsd:gYear. Flat per §Q6a.
yearCompleted.definition: The calendar year in which an alteration or change to a Property, such as a change of use, conservatory addition, or window replacement, was completed.

yearInstalled.label: year installed
yearInstalled.comment: Calendar year the Property's solar-panel system was installed. xsd:gYear (a year value in the data dictionary). Flat per §Q6a.
yearInstalled.definition: The calendar year in which a Property's solar-panel system was installed.

yearOfBuild.label: year of build
yearOfBuild.comment: Calendar year the Property was built. xsd:gYear — the data dictionary types it as a year value; plain datatype per ODR-0008 §Q5a, flat per §Q6a.
yearOfBuild.definition: The calendar year in which a Property was built.

yearTested.label: year tested
yearTested.comment: Calendar year the Property's electrical installation was last tested by a qualified electrician. xsd:gYear. Flat per §Q6a.
yearTested.definition: The calendar year in which a Property's electrical installation was last tested by a qualified electrician.

yearWorkCarriedOut.label: year work carried out
yearWorkCarriedOut.comment: Calendar year electrical work was carried out on the Property (since 2005). xsd:gYear. Flat per §Q6a.
yearWorkCarriedOut.definition: The calendar year in which electrical work was carried out on a Property.

zoom.label: zoom

zoom.definition: The zoom level of the Google Street View camera position for a Property's map locator.

constraints.message: Address addressVariant MUST be a single xsd:string value (one of 'title' | 'marketing' | 'inspire') per ODR-0015 §Rule 6. Distinguishes the authority lifecycle borne by the Address instance.

opda:typeOfConnection MUST be one of the opda:BroadbandConnectionTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

An opda:Buyer role, where it names a distinct bearer node via opda:playedBy, MUST be played by an opda:Person OR an opda:Organisation (ODR-0006 §SHACL role-play shape; Council session-047 Q4). OPTIONAL — co-typed roles with no distinct bearer node are conformant (no sh:minCount, never a self-edge).
Claim digest MUST be a single xsd:string value when present. The digest hashes the (assertion-content, evidence-set, attestor) tuple per ODR-0009 §Q1.

Class-promoted descriptive Information Object MUST carry prov:wasGeneratedBy to its issuing activity per ODR-0008 §Q4a three-criterion test (authority-retrieved provenance is the IC discriminator for class-promotion).

The comparable record's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
The comparable record's issue date SHOULD be named via prov:generatedAtTime (IC component 3 of 3 — issue date; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
The comparable record's issuing authority SHOULD be named via prov:wasAttributedTo (IC component 1 of 3 — issuing authority; ODR-0008d Rule 3).

opda:constructionType MUST be one of the opda:ConstructionTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).
DPVMappingRecord MUST target exactly one Kind class via opda:targetsKind. ODR-0012 Phase 1 governance discipline (reference-not-import for DPV).

Class-promoted descriptive Information Object MUST carry prov:wasGeneratedBy to its issuing activity per ODR-0008 §Q4a three-criterion test (authority-retrieved provenance is the IC discriminator for class-promotion).

The EPC certificate's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
The EPC certificate's issue date SHOULD be named via prov:generatedAtTime (IC component 3 of 3 — issue date; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
The EPC certificate's issuing authority SHOULD be named via prov:wasAttributedTo (IC component 1 of 3 — issuing authority; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
Evidence digest MUST be a single xsd:string value when present. Provides content-addressable provenance per ODR-0009 §Q1.
opda:evidenceType MUST be one of the opda:EvidenceMethodScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).
Fixtures-item comment reuses opda:disclosureDetail (A-grade; ODR-0022 §4) — never a per-item comment property.

Fixtures-item opda:inclusionStatus MUST be one of the opda:InclusionStatusScheme values (Excluded / Included / None) — a sale-transaction Mode, never a Quality of opda:Property (ODR-0022 §4 / session-027 R4).
Fixtures-item opda:price is the shared monetary-amount property (one property reused across all items; ODR-0022 §4 — never one price property per item).

LegalEstate identity surface: tenureKind (Freehold / Leasehold / Commonhold) MUST be a single concept IRI when present. The full rights-bundle IC per ODR-0005 §3b is enforced by the registered-title binding via opda:recordsEstate.
opda:marketingTenure MUST be one of the opda:TenureKindScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

opda:mediaUrl (media URL) MUST be a well-formed http(s) URI (sh:datatype xsd:anyURI + URI sh:pattern). The property is rdfs:domain-less (cross-artefact reference; ODR-0024 R11 / session-028 Q5) — this shape constrains its value-space via sh:targetSubjectsOf rather than a bearer class.
Milestone plannedAtTime MUST be a single xsd:dateTime value when present. The variance against occurredAtTime is tracked by the MilestoneVarianceRule SHACL-AF rule below.
opda:MonetaryAmount MUST carry exactly one opda:amount magnitude (xsd:decimal) — the numeric dimension of the value structure (ODR-0024 R3).

opda:MonetaryAmount MUST carry exactly one opda:currency, one of the opda:CurrencyScheme concepts (a dereferenceable ISO-4217 code, never an opaque string; never absent on the value type — ODR-0024 R3). The overlay profile supplies GBP as the default.
opda:ofstedRating MUST be one of the opda:OfstedRatingScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

Organisation identity-key surface: hasAssertedCapacity MUST be a single concept IRI when present. Full IC per ODR-0006 §Q6 borne by the registration-record (LEI / Companies House number); subclass relationship to org:Organization preserves cross-vocabulary identity.
opda:ownerType MUST be one of the opda:OwnerTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

Person identity-key surface: hasAssertedCapacity MUST be a single concept IRI when present. The full Person IC per ODR-0006 §Q1 is borne by the identifier-bundle (NI number / passport / driving-licence); succession is tracked by the IdentifierSuccessionRule SHACL-AF rule below.

opda:priceQualifier MUST be one of the opda:PriceQualifierScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).

Property co-reference MUST use opda:identifiesSameProperty (an IRI-valued ObjectProperty); owl:sameAs is forbidden per ODR-0005 Rule 5 because it propagates identity-collapse across contexts under reasoning.

Property hasUPRN, when present, MUST be a single xsd:string value. Absence is admissible (UPRN is a contingent administrative identifier per ODR-0005 §6a); succession is tracked by the UPRNSuccessionRule SHACL-AF rule below.

A Proprietorship Relator MUST mediate ≥2 Proprietor roles (opda:mediates, sh:minCount 2; sh:class opda:Proprietor) — a relator that binds fewer than two bearers is not a relator (UFO Guizzardi 2005 Ch.4 §4.4; ODR-0006 §Q3). Design-time + SHACL-validated, never reasoned.
RiskAssessment opda:actionAlertRating MUST be one of the opda:ActionAlertRatingScheme levels (integer 1–5, 1 Green … 5 Red; ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4).

RiskAssessment result / summary / recommendations are opda:disclosureDetail-grade strings (ODR-0008d Rule 1c); the specific field is carried by the instance-level dct:source, never a per-field property (ODR-0022 §Rules.6).

Each opda:hasSubAssessment (a riskSubcategories[] entry) MUST itself satisfy the RiskAssessment shape — the self-referential result recursion via sh:node (ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4). ACYCLICITY (ODR-0024 R11): the sub-assessment graph MUST be acyclic — a RiskAssessment MUST NOT be its own transitive sub-assessment (core SHACL cannot test transitive closure; a SHACL-AF closure rule is the enforcement vehicle, deferred).
RiskAssessment opda:peril MUST be one of the 12 opda:PerilScheme concepts (a dereferenceable peril, never an opaque string; ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 2).
RiskAssessment opda:riskIndicator MUST be one of the opda:YesNoNotKnownScheme values (No / Not known / Yes; ODR-0008d Rule 1c / Rule 4).
RiskAssessment datasetAttribution REUSES prov:wasAttributedTo (ODR-0008d Rule 5 — the dataset's licensing/copyright Agent; opda:datasetAttribution is NEVER minted).

opda:playedBy MUST point at an opda:Person OR an opda:Organisation (the role bearer). This sh:or is the AUTHORITATIVE bearer disjunction; the predicate also carries documentary "any-of" rdfs:range opda:Person , opda:Organisation (read disjunctively, never entailed — ADR-0035; Council session-047 Q4/Q5 / session-050). OPTIONAL / distinct-node-only — emitted only where the role qua-individual is a node distinct from its bearer; never a self-edge.

opda:RoomDimension length (metres) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

opda:RoomDimension roomName (non-rigid label) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

opda:RoomDimension width (metres) is a single-valued by-value field (ODR-0024 R10 / session-030); the structure carries NO identity key (it is individuated by value, the opda:MonetaryAmount pattern) and opda:roomName is non-rigid — never a key.

Class-promoted descriptive Information Object MUST carry prov:wasGeneratedBy to its issuing activity per ODR-0008 §Q4a three-criterion test (authority-retrieved provenance is the IC discriminator for class-promotion).

The search's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
The search's issue date SHOULD be named via prov:generatedAtTime (IC component 3 of 3 — issue date; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
The search's issuing authority SHOULD be named via prov:wasAttributedTo (IC component 1 of 3 — issuing authority; ODR-0008d Rule 3).

An opda:Seller role, where it names a distinct bearer node via opda:playedBy, MUST be played by an opda:Person OR an opda:Organisation (ODR-0006 §SHACL role-play shape; Council session-047 Q4). OPTIONAL — co-typed roles with no distinct bearer node are conformant (no sh:minCount, never a self-edge).

Class-promoted descriptive Information Object MUST carry prov:wasGeneratedBy to its issuing activity per ODR-0008 §Q4a three-criterion test (authority-retrieved provenance is the IC discriminator for class-promotion).

The survey's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
The survey's issue date SHOULD be named via prov:generatedAtTime (IC component 3 of 3 — issue date; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
The survey's issuing authority SHOULD be named via prov:wasAttributedTo (IC component 1 of 3 — issuing authority; ODR-0008d Rule 3).

Transaction identity-key surface: occurredAtTime MUST be a single xsd:dateTime value when present. The full Transaction-as-Relator IC per ODR-0007 §Q1 is the (mediated-bearers, founding-event) tuple; this shape covers the founding-event timestamp.
opda:transportType MUST be one of the opda:TransportTypeScheme member values (ODR-0024 R5/R6 — a controlled value-space sh:in-restricted via sh:targetSubjectsOf, holding without an overlay profile).
opda:ufoCategory MUST be one of the nine UFO meta-categories (the opda:UFOCategoryScheme notations) — ODR-0031 R3 tag-level editorial guard on the facet value-space.
Claim MUST carry prov:wasDerivedFrom (or be explicitly marked unverified per Moreau S009 amendment). ODR-0013 §Severity tiering Cat 2: unprovenanced Claims are a Violation-tier IC breach.

opda:url (URL) MUST be a well-formed http(s) URI (sh:datatype xsd:anyURI + URI sh:pattern). The property is rdfs:domain-less (cross-artefact reference; ODR-0024 R11 / session-028 Q5) — this shape constrains its value-space via sh:targetSubjectsOf rather than a bearer class.

Class-promoted descriptive Information Object MUST carry prov:wasGeneratedBy to its issuing activity per ODR-0008 §Q4a three-criterion test (authority-retrieved provenance is the IC discriminator for class-promotion).

The valuation's authority reference / number SHOULD be recorded (IC component 2 of 3 — authority reference; ODR-0008d Rule 3), carried by opda:disclosureDetail with an instance-level dct:source to the reference question.
The valuation's issue date SHOULD be named via prov:generatedAtTime (IC component 3 of 3 — issue date; ODR-0008d Rule 3).
The valuation's issuing authority SHOULD be named via prov:wasAttributedTo (IC component 1 of 3 — issuing authority; ODR-0008d Rule 3).

CollectiveCategory.definition: An aggregate of endurants with uniform membership (cf. gufo:Collection).

ConveyancingContext.definition: Legal transfer of estate; overlays ta6/ta7/ta10/lpe1.

EstateAgencyContext.definition: Marketing and sale of residential property; overlays baspi5/nts2.

EventCategory.definition: A perdurant (occurrent): an entity that unfolds in time and has temporal parts.

InformationObjectCategory.definition: An informational artefact / information content entity (documentary). An OPDA domain category rather than a core UFO endurant universal — cf. IAO information content entity (ODR-0030 Rule 4 crosswalk).

MortgageLendingContext.definition: Lending secured against property; overlays fme1.

PropertyDataServicesContext.definition: Aggregation and supply of property data; overlays con29R/con29DW/llc1/oc1/rds/sr24.

PropertyTechnologyContext.definition: Orchestration and system-to-system messaging spanning the industry contexts.

QualityCategory.definition: An individualised quality inhering in an endurant. Descends from DOLCE's Quality (Masolo et al., WonderWeb D18, 2003).

QualityValueCategory.definition: The value of a quality — its position (Quale) in a quality region / space. Descends from DOLCE's Quale-in-Region (Masolo et al., WonderWeb D18, 2003).

RelatorCategory.definition: A relational endurant founded by an event, mediating two or more bearers (OntoClean +R, +I, +D). The relational-reification primitive (ODR-0030): it owns the relation's aggregation/modal attributes.

RoleCategory.definition: An anti-rigid, externally-founded sortal role played by a single Kind (OntoClean −R, +D).

RoleMixinCategory.definition: An anti-rigid, externally-founded, dispersive (cross-sortal) role (OntoClean −R, +D) that spans more than one Kind.

scheme/actionAlertRating/1.definition: Action alert rating 1 — Green (lowest risk band).

scheme/actionAlertRating/5.definition: Action alert rating 5 — Red (highest risk band).

scheme/addressVariant/inspire.definition: INSPIRE Directive variant of an Address — the regulated postal address structure published by INSPIRE-aligned registers (administrative boundary alignment).

scheme/addressVariant/marketing.definition: Marketing-presentation variant of an Address (estate-agent advertising format; typically de-formalised street name + town). Used in advertising and marketing contexts.

scheme/addressVariant/postal.definition: Royal Mail PAF-formatted variant of an Address (the address as recognised by Royal Mail's Postcode Address File).

scheme/addressVariant/title.definition: HM Land Registry registered-title variant of an Address; the address as recorded against the title at HMLR.

scheme/assuranceLevel/High.definition: High degree of confidence in the claimed or asserted identity of a person (eIDAS Article 8(2)(c) High).

scheme/assuranceLevel/Low.definition: Limited degree of confidence in the claimed or asserted identity of a person (eIDAS Article 8(2)(a) Low).

scheme/assuranceLevel/PDTF-Standard.definition: OPDA-specific intermediate assurance level per ODR-0009 §Q3, applicable to PDTF transactions where eIDAS LoA mapping is not directly available.

scheme/assuranceLevel/Substantial.definition: Substantial degree of confidence in the claimed or asserted identity of a person (eIDAS Article 8(2)(b) Substantial).

scheme/attachmentStatus/Attached.definition: The supporting document is attached now.

scheme/attachmentStatus/To-follow.definition: The supporting document is to follow later.

scheme/attachmentStatusNotApplicable/Att.definition: The supporting document is attached now.

scheme/attachmentStatusNotApplicable/Not.definition: No supporting document applies in this context.

scheme/attachmentStatusNotApplicable/To-.definition: The supporting document is to follow later.

scheme/boundaryResponsibility/Neighbour.definition: The neighbour is responsible for the boundary.

scheme/boundaryResponsibility/Seller.definition: The Seller is responsible for the boundary.

scheme/boundaryResponsibility/Shared.definition: Responsibility for the boundary is shared with the neighbour.

scheme/builtForm/Detached.definition: Free-standing dwelling sharing no walls with neighbouring properties.

scheme/builtForm/End-terrace.definition: Dwelling at the end of a terrace, sharing one wall with a neighbouring property.

scheme/builtForm/Mid-terrace.definition: Dwelling within a terrace, sharing walls with neighbouring properties on both sides.

scheme/builtForm/Other.definition: Built form falling outside the standard categories; relies on a free-text note for context.

scheme/builtForm/Semi-detached.definition: Dwelling sharing one wall with a single neighbouring property.

scheme/centralHeatingFuelType/Electricit.definition: Electrical heating supplied via the mains electricity network.

scheme/centralHeatingFuelType/LPG.definition: Liquefied Petroleum Gas stored on-site for combustion.

scheme/centralHeatingFuelType/Mains-gas.definition: Natural gas supplied via the mains gas network.

scheme/centralHeatingFuelType/Oil.definition: Heating oil stored on-site for combustion.

scheme/centralHeatingFuelType/Other.definition: Fuel type falling outside the standard categories.

scheme/chargePaymentStatus/Anticipated.definition: The charge is anticipated but not yet due.

scheme/chargePaymentStatus/Completed-but.definition: The charge period has completed but the charge is unpaid.

scheme/chargePaymentStatus/Not-applicabl.definition: No charge applies in this context.

scheme/currency/EUR.definition: Euro (EUR) — for cross-border or non-sterling monetary amounts.

scheme/currency/GBP.definition: Pound sterling (GBP) — the default currency for UK property transactions; supplied as the default value by the overlay profile (ODR-0024 R3).

scheme/currency/USD.definition: United States dollar (USD) — for non-sterling monetary amounts.

scheme/currentEnergyRating/A.definition: EPC current energy rating band A as defined by DESNZ.

scheme/evidenceMethod/Document.definition: OIDC4IDA Document evidence: identity evidence obtained by inspecting a physical or digital identity document (passport, driving licence, identity card, etc.).

scheme/evidenceMethod/Electronic-Record.definition: OIDC4IDA ElectronicRecord evidence: identity evidence obtained from a verified electronic record held by an authoritative source.

scheme/evidenceMethod/Vouch.definition: OIDC4IDA Vouch evidence: identity evidence obtained through attestation by a trusted third party.

scheme/heatingType/Central-heating.definition: Whole-property heating distributed from a single central source.

scheme/heatingType/Communal-heating-syst.definition: Heating shared between multiple dwellings (e.g. district heating).

scheme/heatingType/Room-heaters-only.definition: Heating provided by per-room appliances rather than a central system.

scheme/inclusion/Excluded.definition: The item is excluded from the sale.

scheme/inclusion/Included.definition: The item is included in the sale.

scheme/inclusionStatus/Excluded.definition: The item is excluded from the sale (the seller will remove it).

scheme/inclusionStatus/Included.definition: The item is included in the sale.

scheme/inclusionStatus/None.definition: There is no such item at the property.

scheme/managedAreaResponsibility/Managem.definition: A management company deals with maintenance.

scheme/managedAreaResponsibility/Managin.definition: A managing agent deals with maintenance.

scheme/managedAreaResponsibility/Rentcha.definition: The rentcharge owner deals with maintenance.

scheme/managedAreaResponsibility/the-Les.definition: The lessees collectively deal with maintenance.

scheme/milestoneKind/completion.definition: Completion; legal title transfers; keys handed over.

scheme/milestoneKind/exchange.definition: Contracts exchanged; transaction binding on both parties.

scheme/milestoneKind/instruction.definition: Property instructed to market by Seller; transaction lifecycle begins.

scheme/milestoneKind/offerAccepted.definition: Offer accepted by Seller; transaction enters Under Offer phase.

scheme/milestoneKind/registration.definition: Registration completed at HM Land Registry.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Cesspi.definition: On-site cesspit (sealed underground container) collecting foul sewerage for periodic removal.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Not-kn.definition: Off-mains drainage system type is not known to the Seller.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Other.definition: Drainage type falling outside the standard off-mains categories.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Septic.definition: On-site septic-tank treatment for foul sewerage.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Sewera.definition: On-site sewerage treatment plant treating foul sewerage before discharge.

scheme/offMainsDrainageSystemType/Sustai.definition: Drainage routed to a SuDS (Sustainable Drainage System) designed to manage surface water close to source.

scheme/ofstedRating/Other.definition: An Ofsted rating outside the standard four grades.

scheme/ownershipType/Commonhold.definition: Freehold ownership of a unit within a commonhold development, with shared ownership of common parts.

scheme/ownershipType/Freehold.definition: Outright ownership of the property and the land it sits on.

scheme/ownershipType/Leasehold.definition: Ownership of the property for a fixed period under a lease from the freeholder.

scheme/ownershipType/Other.definition: Ownership type falling outside the standard categories.

scheme/ownerType/Organisation.definition: Legal owner is an organisation (opda:Organisation Substance Kind, e.g. company, trust, charity).

scheme/ownerType/Private-individual.definition: Legal owner is a natural person (opda:Person Substance Kind).

scheme/participantStatus/Active.definition: Participant is actively engaged in the transaction.

scheme/participantStatus/Invited.definition: Participant has been invited to join the transaction.

scheme/participantStatus/Proposed.definition: Participant has been proposed but not yet invited.

scheme/participantStatus/Removed.definition: Participant has been removed from the transaction.

scheme/peril/Climate.definition: Climate-change-related physical risk (heat, drought, future flood projection), governed by commercial climate-analytics datasets (Groundsure).

scheme/peril/CoalMining.definition: Risk arising from past or present coal-mining activity, governed by the Coal Authority (a satisfactory coal-mining search is a standard lender mortgage condition).

scheme/peril/CoastalErosion.definition: Risk from coastal erosion and shoreline change, governed by Environment Agency / Shoreline Management Plan data.

scheme/peril/ContaminatedLand.definition: Risk from land contamination (former industrial / landfill use), governed by the local authority Part 2A register and commercial environmental datasets.

scheme/peril/Energy.definition: Energy-infrastructure proximity risk (wind turbines, solar farms, fracking / shale licences), governed by DESNZ energy-infrastructure data.

scheme/peril/Flooding.definition: Risk of flooding of any type (river, surface-water, coastal, groundwater) at the property, governed by Environment Agency flood data.

scheme/peril/GroundStability.definition: Risk from ground instability (subsidence, landslip, shrink-swell clay, dissolution), governed by British Geological Survey (BGS) ground-stability data.

scheme/peril/Infrastructure.definition: Major-infrastructure-project proximity risk (HS2, road / rail schemes, energy projects), governed by commercial infrastructure datasets (Landmark).

scheme/peril/NonCoalMining.definition: Risk arising from past or present non-coal mineral extraction (tin, clay, limestone, etc.), governed by BGS / commercial search-provider mining data.

scheme/peril/Planning.definition: Planning-application and planning-constraint risk in the vicinity of the property, governed by the local planning authority.

scheme/peril/Radon.definition: Risk from naturally-occurring radon gas, governed by the UK Health Security Agency (UKHSA) radon-affected-area data.

scheme/peril/Transportation.definition: Transport-scheme proximity risk (railways, roads, airports), governed by commercial transportation datasets (Landmark).

scheme/priceQualifier/From.definition: Price from the stated figure (e.g. new-build ranges).

scheme/priceQualifier/Offers-in-excess-o.definition: Offers sought in excess of the stated figure.

scheme/priceQualifier/Offers-in-region-o.definition: Offers sought in the region of the stated figure.

scheme/priceQualifier/Offers-over.definition: Offers sought over the stated figure.

scheme/propertyType/Flat.definition: A self-contained dwelling forming part of a larger building.

scheme/propertyType/House.definition: A self-contained dwelling occupying a complete structure.

scheme/propertyType/Maisonette.definition: A self-contained dwelling within a larger building, typically with its own external entrance.

scheme/propertyType/Other.definition: Property type falling outside the standard categories.

scheme/propertyType/Park-home.definition: A detached single-storey dwelling sited within a residential park.

scheme/roadAdoptionStatus/private.definition: The road or footway is privately maintained.

scheme/roadAdoptionStatus/public.definition: The road or footway is maintainable at public expense.

scheme/roadAdoptionStatus/section-38.definition: The road or footway is subject to a Highways Act 1980 section-38 adoption agreement.

scheme/roadAdoptionStatus/unchecked.definition: The adoption status has not been checked.

scheme/role/Buyers-Agent.definition: Professional appointed by the Buyer to search for and negotiate on a property.

scheme/role/Buyers-Conveyancer.definition: Legal professional acting for the Buyer in the transaction.

scheme/role/Estate-Agent.definition: Professional appointed by the Seller to market the property.

scheme/role/Landlord.definition: Party granting a tenancy over the property.

scheme/role/Lender.definition: Institution providing mortgage finance to the Buyer.

scheme/role/Mortgage-Broker.definition: Intermediary arranging mortgage finance for the Buyer.

scheme/role/Prospective-Buyer.definition: Party with intent to acquire legal title (pre-offer).

scheme/role/Sellers-Conveyancer.definition: Legal professional acting for the Seller in the transaction.

scheme/role/Surveyor.definition: Professional performing a survey or valuation on behalf of a party to the transaction.

scheme/role/Tenant.definition: Party occupying the property under a tenancy.

scheme/sellersCapacity/Assistant.definition: Seller acts in an assisting capacity (e.g. legal assistant).

scheme/sellersCapacity/Legal-Owner.definition: Seller is the legal owner of the property.

scheme/sellersCapacity/Mortgagee-in-Poss.definition: Seller is a mortgagee that has taken possession of the property.

scheme/sellersCapacity/Other.definition: Capacity falling outside the standard categories.

scheme/sellersCapacity/Personal-Represen.prefLabel: Personal Representative for a Deceased Owner
scheme/sellersCapacity/Personal-Represen.definition: Seller acts as personal representative for a deceased owner.

scheme/sellersCapacity/Under-Power-of-At.definition: Seller acts under a power of attorney on behalf of the legal owner.

scheme/transactionStatus/Accepted.definition: An offer has been accepted, transaction is in progress.

scheme/transactionStatus/Completed.definition: Transaction has completed; legal title has transferred.

scheme/transactionStatus/Offered.definition: An offer has been made on the property.

scheme/transportType/Bus-stop-station.definition: A bus stop or bus station.

scheme/transportType/Other.definition: A transport type outside the standard categories.

scheme/transportType/Trunk-road-motorway.definition: A trunk-road or motorway access point.

scheme/utilityConnectionStatus/To-be-con.definition: The utility is to be connected.

scheme/utilityConnectionStatusNotKnown/N.definition: The connection status is not known to the Seller.

scheme/utilityConnectionStatusNotKnown/T.definition: The utility is to be connected.

scheme/yesNo/No.definition: Negative answer to a binary BASPI5 question.

scheme/yesNo/Yes.definition: Affirmative answer to a binary BASPI5 question.

scheme/yesNoNotApplicable/Not-applicable.definition: Question does not apply in this context.

scheme/yesNoNotKnown/Not-known.definition: Answer is not known to the Seller.

scheme/yesNoNotRequired/Not-required.definition: Answer is not required in this context.

SubstanceKindCategory.definition: A rigid sortal (OntoClean +R, +O) that supplies its own principle of identity — instances are necessarily of this type, and it carries an identity criterion its instances inherit.

SurveyingContext.definition: Physical inspection and valuation; overlays piq.

BoundedContextScheme.definition: The six industry bounded contexts of the UK PDTF, each owning a SHACL overlay profile (ODR-0010). Domain-term membership in a context is a derived, on-demand query (opda:servesContext per ODR-0020), never hand-authored except per ODR-0019 Rule 8.

scheme/ActionAlertRatingScheme.definition: The value-space of opda:actionAlertRating on an opda:RiskAssessment: an ordinal 1–5 scale where 1 is Green (lowest risk) and 5 is Red (highest risk). Derived from the data dictionary's actual actionAlertRating integer leaf + its title "Action alert rating (1 is Green, 5 is Red)" (ODR-0008d Rule 4).

scheme/AddressVariantScheme.definition: Quality Values for the variant under which an Address is presented (marketing, title, inspire, postal). Each variant particularises an underlying Address Substance Kind per ODR-0015 §Q1.

scheme/AssuranceLevelScheme.definition: Quality Values for the eIDAS Levels of Assurance (Low, Substantial, High) plus the OPDA-specific PDTF-Standard intermediate level per ODR-0009 §Q3, applied to identity-verification claims.

scheme/AttachmentStatusNotApplicableSche.definition: Status of a supporting document attached to a disclosure answer, admitting non-applicable as a third option (Attached / Not applicable / To follow).

scheme/AttachmentStatusScheme.definition: Status of a supporting document attached to a disclosure answer: provided now, or to follow.

scheme/BoundaryResponsibilityScheme.definition: Which party is responsible for a legal boundary of the property (the Seller, shared, the neighbour, or not known).

scheme/BroadbandConnectionTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a Property's broadband connection type (None / ADSL copper wire / Cable / FTTC (Fibre to the Cabinet) / FTTP (Fibre to the Premises)).

scheme/BuiltFormScheme.definition: Classification of a Property's structural built-form (detached, semi-detached, terraced, etc.).

scheme/CentralHeatingFuelTypeScheme.definition: Classification of the fuel used by a Property's central heating system.

scheme/ChargePaymentStatusScheme.definition: Payment status of a managed-area charge (due, completed but unpaid, anticipated, or not applicable).

scheme/ConstructionTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a Property's standard-form construction type (Brick and block / Steel frame / Timber frame / Insulated concrete framework / Structural insulated panel (SIP)).

scheme/CouncilTaxBandSchemeEW.definition: Valuation Office Agency banding for England & Wales (Bands A–H) assigned to each domestic property for council tax calculation.

scheme/CouncilTaxBandSchemeScotland.definition: Scottish Assessors Association banding for Scotland (Bands A–I) assigned to each domestic property for council tax calculation. Band I is Scotland-specific.

scheme/CurrencyScheme.definition: The currency of an opda:MonetaryAmount — an ISO-4217 alpha-3 currency code. Seeded with the currencies occurring in UK property-pack data (GBP / EUR / USD); extensible to the full ISO-4217 code space as data requires.

scheme/CurrentEnergyRatingScheme.definition: EPC current energy rating banding (A–G) published by DESNZ (Department for Energy Security and Net Zero) for residential properties in England & Wales.

scheme/DeedSupplyStatusScheme.definition: Supply status of a requested deed or document: attached now, to follow, or lost.

scheme/EvidenceMethodScheme.definition: The OIDC4IDA `evidence.type` kinds of identity evidence (Document, Electronic-Record, Vouch) — the governed facet for opda:evidenceType, bound to the evidence subclasses by skos:exactMatch (ODR-0011 §8a).

scheme/FeeTypeScheme.definition: Type of recurring fee a payee collects for a managed freehold or commonhold (service charges, ground rent, administration fees, or all).

scheme/FittedOrFreestandingScheme.definition: Whether a kitchen appliance is fitted (built in) or freestanding (movable).

scheme/FixtureItemScheme.definition: Controlled list of the fixtures-and-fittings checklist *items* (boiler/immersion heater, radiators, curtains, carpets, kitchen appliances, garden items, etc.) a seller discloses for a sale. Items are Objects/Kinds; their inclusion in a given sale is a Mode/Relator of the transaction (council-reserved, ODR-0023 R4) and is NOT a property of any item concept.

scheme/HeatingTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a Property's overall heating-system arrangement (central, communal, room-only, or none).

scheme/InclusionScheme.definition: Whether a free-text 'other item' is included in or excluded from the sale (binary variant, no 'None' option).

scheme/InclusionStatusScheme.definition: Whether a fixtures-and-fittings item is included in, excluded from, or absent from (None) the sale. NOTE: this is the *value-space* only; the inclusion-status property that ranges over it is council-reserved (ODR-0023 R4) and is NOT minted here.

scheme/ManagedAreaResponsibilityScheme.definition: Which party deals with the day-to-day maintenance of a managed area. The canonical six-value superset; per-form subsets (e.g. without 'the Lessees', or without 'Rentcharge Owner') are `sh:in` restrictions in the overlay profile, NOT separate schemes (ODR-0011 §1a).

scheme/MilestoneKindScheme.definition: Method/plan codes for the procedural milestones authorising stages of a Transaction Activity (instruction → offerAccepted → exchange → completion → registration).

scheme/OffMainsDrainageSystemTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a Property's off-mains drainage system (SuDS / Septic tank / Cesspit / Sewerage treatment plant / Other / Not known).

scheme/OfstedRatingScheme.definition: Ofsted school-inspection rating of a nearby school (opda:NearbyFacility school band): Outstanding / Good / Requires Improvement / Inadequate / Other.

scheme/OwnershipTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a legal estate's ownership structure (Freehold, Leasehold, Commonhold, Other).

scheme/OwnerTypeScheme.definition: Substance Kind labels discriminating Private individual (opda:Person) from Organisation (opda:Organisation) as legal owner. Distinct from RoleScheme (transactional role) and TenureKindScheme (sub-Kind of LegalEstate).

scheme/ParticipantStatusScheme.definition: Phase labels for the lifecycle of a Participant Substance Kind.

scheme/PerilScheme.definition: The 12 environmental / local-authority search perils a property's authority-retrieved risk assessments (opda:RiskAssessment) are individuated by. Each peril is a dereferenceable concept governed by a named data authority (ODR-0008d Rule 2); the peril is NEVER an opaque string and NEVER an rdfs:subClassOf hierarchy (a delimited value-space is a scheme, not a class tree).

scheme/PriceQualifierScheme.definition: Qualifier on a Property's marketed asking price (Price / Fixed price / Guide price / Offers in excess of / Offers in region of / Offers over / Offers invited / Sale by tender / From).

scheme/PropertyTypeScheme.definition: Substance Kind labels for the physical-form kind of a Property (House / Bungalow / Park home / Flat / Maisonette / Other). Distinct from BuiltFormScheme which carries the structural Quale (Detached / Semi-detached / Terrace).

scheme/RoadAdoptionStatusScheme.definition: Maintenance-responsibility status of an abutting road or footway: publicly maintained, private, subject to a section-38 agreement, or unchecked.

scheme/RoleScheme.definition: Role labels for the anti-rigid Roles a Person/Organisation plays as a Participant in a Transaction Relator.

scheme/SchoolTypeScheme.definition: The value-space of opda:schoolType on opda:NearbyFacility — the band of a nearby school (College / Nursery / Primary / Secondary / Private). Replaces the five range-less generic object properties the council rejected (session-028 Q1); minted from the schoolType structural band set, not a data-dictionary enum.

scheme/SellersCapacityScheme.definition: Method/plan codes for the capacity under which a Seller is authorised to act in a sale.

scheme/TenureKindScheme.definition: Substance Kind labels for tenure (Freehold, Leasehold, Commonhold). Each member binds to its corresponding OWL sub-class via `skos:exactMatch` per ODR-0011 §8a Substance Kind label cross-scheme consistency check (NEVER `owl:sameAs`).

scheme/TransactionStatusScheme.definition: Phase labels for the lifecycle of a Transaction Substance Kind, tracking the five canonical phases ADR-0010 names (Listed → Offered → Accepted → Exchanged → Completed).

scheme/TransportTypeScheme.definition: Classification of a nearby transport node (opda:NearbyFacility transport band): Local connection / Ferry terminal / Bus stop/station / National rail station / Trunk road/motorway / Airport / Helipad / Tramway / Underground/Subway / Other.

scheme/UnitOfAreaScheme.definition: Unit in which an internal floor area is expressed (square metres or square feet).

scheme/UtilityConnectionStatusNotKnownSc.definition: Mains-utility connection status admitting unknown-to-Seller as a fourth option (Yes / No / To be connected / Not known).

scheme/UtilityConnectionStatusScheme.definition: Whether a mains utility (electricity, gas, water, drainage) is connected, not connected, or to be connected.

scheme/YesNoNotApplicableScheme.definition: Mode label register for BASPI5 questions admitting non-applicable as a third option (Yes / No / Not applicable).

scheme/YesNoNotKnownScheme.definition: Mode label register for BASPI5 questions admitting unknown-to-Seller as a third option (Yes / No / Not known).

scheme/YesNoNotRequiredScheme.definition: Mode label register for BASPI5 questions admitting not-required as a third option (Yes / No / Not required).

scheme/YesNoScheme.definition: Binary register for affirmative/negative answers to BASPI5 discriminator questions (Yes / No).

UFOCategoryScheme.definition: The nine UFO foundational meta-categories OPDA classifies its classes under. Each concept carries its OntoClean signature and a skos:closeMatch to the corresponding gUFO type where one exists. Referenced-not-imported; never reasoned over (ODR-0031 R2).
